notes: All LLM systems use the active TurboFlux endpoint and gpt-5.5.
Native reasoning is disabled; protocol differences are recorded per run.

Adaptive case-level concurrency starts at 1 and may rise to 1; FastContext uses one closed listwise model judgment and the API request ceiling is 1. Systems within one case remain sequential and rotated.
Transient failures are retried up to 3 time(s) per run invocation.
Selection starts after 4 balanced case(s), allowing a disjoint development slice.
